## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] I have followed the code style conventions described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] All components use `input()` / `output()` signals (no `@Input` / `@Output` decorators)
- [ ] All templates use `@if` / `@for` / `@switch` control flow (no `*ngIf` / `*ngFor`)
- [ ] All CSS uses design tokens (`var(--component-*)`, `var(--semantic-*)`, `var(--primitive-*)`) — no hardcoded values
- [ ] Accessibility: ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, and `focus-visible` styles are present
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public APIs have JSDoc / TSDoc comments
